description:
Document with the trousseau list for the marriage of Sitt al-ʿIzz and Yeter ha-Levi. On parchment. In the hand of Mevorakh b. Natan b. Shemuel. The value of the trousseau amounts to 530 dinars, plus 50 for the delayed marriage payment (meʾuḥar). Signed by Yefet b. Efrayim and Saʿadya b. Yehuda. Validated by Shemuʾel ha-Levi b. [Saʿadya?] and Elʿazar b. [...]. Join: Alan Elbaum. 

Verso contains various jottings including undeciphered Arabic script. (Information in part from CUDL and Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
